name: Hitoha Marui
description: Hitoha is the youngest child. She is strange, cold, and introverted. She seems to float in the class room as a ghost. She carries around a perverted book. She also seems to have a sort of "cuteness" to a hamster, named Chikubi. She also loves "Gachi Ranger" which is a parody of "Super Sentai" or "Power Ranger". She also has a fear of heights.

name: Julia
description: Julia is a beautiful and mysterious woman from both Spike and Vicious' pasts. A love triangle among the three caused Spike to leave the syndicate rather than challenge Vicious. Spike had wanted to take her with him when he left the syndicate, but she was blackmailed by Vicious into almost shooting Spike. Vicious found out they were planning to run away together and confronted Julia, telling her that she would have to kill Spike, or both of them would be killed. To protect not only herself but al

name: Juubei Yagyuu
description: Muneakira's first master samurai, with the contractual mark on her chest. She also has a power level of five million when she transforms, but in this state she has shown a sadistic side, yet she is an honourable warrior who gives respect to those whom have earned it. In her normal form however, she has no memories of her former life, and has an obsession with her "onii-chan" (big brother), Muneakira. She is also airheaded, innocent, and acts very much like a child, which is reinforced by the fac

name: Kanta Mizuno
description: Mizuno Kanta, also known as The Great Kanto Desert's Ghost, the Sunabouzu, is the main character of Desert Punk. He is infamously known as the most skilled handyman in the desert, performing tasks no one else could or would with a 100% success rate. All around, is a pretty humorous guy but when he gets mad you better run for cover. His only weakness is women.

name: Karen Moriya
description: [Chinatsu](https://anilist.co/character/191241/Chinatsu-Kano)'s best friend and [Haryuu](https://anilist.co/character/225314/Kengo-Haryuu)'s girlfriend.

name: Kira
description: A mega-popular idol who has been performing since childhood.

name: Kuroi Seishi
description: Black Sperm is an arrogant yet insecure monster. He is very confident in his abilities, shown in his willingness to take on Monster King [Orochi](https://anilist.co/character/126979/Orochi), but he dislikes when other people "look down on him" for his appearance or personality, and if he senses that someone is doing so, he becomes furious. At the same time, he is willing to work with others in order to take on a stronger opponent, shown by his cooperation with the Monster Association.

name: Makoto Kashino
description: __Height:__ 160 cm One of the "Sweets Princes" of the school, who specializes in chocolate sweets. His dream is to become a patissier and make chocolate just like his uncle. His parents are a prestigious family of doctors who do not approve of his studying to become a patissier, and therefore one of the conditions under which he can stay at St. Marie Academy is to always be at the top of his class. Kashino is unsociable, straightforward, and has a prickly character. Except for his childhood frie
mediaTitles: Yumeiro Pâtissière: Mune Kyun Tropical Island!
searchTerms: Yumeiro Pâtissière: Mune Kyun Tropical Island!

name: Marika Aoki
description: Marika is a transgender kid who identifies as female. She was born as Yuuta, and changes her name to Marika. ~!She starts developing feelings for Parou after they meet for the first time. They even share a moment, but Marika stops him because it's not what she wants.!~

name: Maruo Kaido
description: Maruo dreams of becoming a manga protagonist as he punches his way into the monstrous world of the Ayashimon Yakuza.

name: Minos
description: A minotaur who is friends with Jashin. Despite being based on a cow, she has no qualms about eating beef.

name: Mun-Gyu
description: Gyu Mun is the female protagonist of Nano Machine. She is the granddaughter of Yun Mun, one of the elders of the Demonic Cult. She is a part of Yeo-Woon Cheon's team during their stay in the Demonic Academy. ~!She is Yeo-Woon's future first wife.!~

name: Nao Kashiwagi
description: Kashiwagi is a good friend of Tsubaki's who often gives her advice.

name: Naruo Taneda
description: Taneda is Meiko's boyfriend and lives in an apartment with her in Tokyo. They support themselves through their jobs (Taneda is an illustrator in a press company), but both up and quit when they realise they just aren't happy. Taneda has a great passion for music and is a guitarist and vocalist in a band with his friends. After quitting his job he decides to try and make it in the music industry by going pro.

name: Oolong
description: Oolong is a shapeshifting humanoid pig, standing about three feet tall with pale pink skin, who tends to dress in trousers, button-down shirts, and suspenders. He was expelled from shapeshifting training for stealing the teacher's underwear and lacks the ability to change his form for more than five minutes at a time without a break. With his shapeshifting, Oolong can look like anything at all. Oolong's initial appearance was as a villain who terrorized a village and kidnapped their young women.

name: Randy Orlando
nativeName: ランディ・オルランド
description: __Nationality__: Crossbellan __Affiliation__: Crossbell Police Department Special Support Section, Crossbell Guardian Force (formerly), ~!Red Constellation Jaeger Corps (formerly)!~ ~!Thors Military Academy Branch Campus (formerly)!~ A shameless flirt and a laidback man. He was formerly a part of the Crossbell Guardian Force before his commander reassigned him to the newly-formed Special Support Section due to his flirtatious nature causing tension within the force. Wields a stun halberd in batt
searchTerms: ランディ・オルランド

name: Rin Baio
description: **Type:** Maniac **Occupation:** Second-Year Middle School Student **Debut:** Chapter 115 **Girlfriend No. 022** Rin is a young violin aficionado because both of her parents are professional violinists. After accidently watching a quick scene from a Resident Evil film as a child, Rin derives pleasure from any sort of depiction of violence.
mediaTitles: The 100 Girlfriends Who Really, Really, Really, Really, Really Love You
searchTerms: The 100 Girlfriends Who Really, Really, Really, Really, Really Love You

name: Run
description: Run is a member of the Jägers. He's a lover of literature. His teigu Banri Hishou Mastema is a wing type. Run is the kind of Esdeath's adviser, because he's probably the smartest person of Jägers.

name: Ryuunosuke Kurosaki
description: __Height:__ 183 cm The third member of the "idiot trio" who frequent Cafe Maid Latte, nicknamed "Kurotatsu". Known for being the perverted one and likes "erotic things". Also used to be a delinquent in middle school with Shiroyan. (Source: Wikipedia)

name: Sawa
description: After losing her parents, Akai and Kanie, detectives investigating in Sawa's parents murder, takes the orphan teenage girl under their protection. Sawa is then forced in a relationship with Akai who abuses her. To make things more ironic, Sawa is forced in committing a series of hits for the corrupted detectives. She is ordered to kill suspected child molesters who are targeting young girls. She makes a short appearance in MEZZO Forte at the beginning of the first OVA.

name: Shii Eniwa
description: __Height:__ 140cm Shii is in the same class as [Koguma](https://anilist.co/character/133946/Koguma) and [Reiko](https://anilist.co/character/133947/Reiko). During the cultural festival, she had troubles with some equipment they needed to move as the teacher's car wasn't available. Per Koguma's desire, Koguma and Reiko helped her using their Cubs. The Cubs piqued Shii's interest and she started to hang out with them. She runs a bakery at her home, which Reiko and Koguma often visit.

name: Shun Shimotsuki
description: He is the male representative for the month of November and is the leader of the unit Procellarum.

name: Sim-Cheong
description: Sim-Cheong is a beggar girl. She lost her mother when she was only 7 days old, and lives with her blind father, who she provides food for through her begging.
